message:
Improve session card layout for narrower screens

- Let first prompt wrap (line-clamp-2) instead of single-line truncate
- Move date/time into the metadata row instead of a separate right column
- Allow metadata row to flex-wrap on narrow viewports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
